sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40895" key="e)pisko/tisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισκότ-ῐσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισκοτ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n40895.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπισκότησις</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:112" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">112</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:119" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">119</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
